2604.25907.title: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? Training Reasoning Models on the Tsallis Loss Continuum
2604.25907.paper_summary: Adapting reasoning models to new tasks during post-training with only output-level supervision stalls under reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) when the initial success probability $p_0$ is small. Using the Tsallis $q$-logarithm, we define a loss family $J_Q$ that interpolates between RLVR (at $q{=}0$, the exploitation pole) and the log-marginal-likelihood over latent trajectories (at $q{=}1$, the density-estimation pole). All members share the same per-example gradient direction, differing only by a scalar amplification $P_{θ^{-q}}$ that reweights each instance independently of the learning rate. This amplification is the mechanism that addresses cold-start stalling: under gradient flow, the exploitation pole requires $Ω(\frac{1}{p_0})$ time to escape cold start, while the density-estimation pole escapes in $Θ\big(\log(\frac{1}{p_0})\big)$; intermediate $q$ trades escape speed against noise memorization. Because $P_θ$ is intractable, we derive two Monte Carlo estimators from the two factorizations of the gradient: Gradient-Amplified RL (GARL) samples from the prior and amplifies the RL gradient, and Posterior-Attenuated Fine-Tuning (PAFT) importance-resamples from the posterior and runs standard SFT. Both have bias $O\big(\frac{q}{M P_θ^{q+1}}\big)$; GARL has lower variance, PAFT has semantically coherent gradients. On FinQA, HotPotQA, and MuSiQue, GARL at $q{=}0.75$ substantially mitigates cold-start stalling, escaping cold start where GRPO fails entirely. In warm start, GARL at low $q$ dominates FinQA where training is stable; on HotPotQA and MuSiQue, GARL destabilizes during training, and PAFT at $q{=}0.75$ provides stable gradients (best overall on HotPotQA at 47.9 maj@16, $+14.4$ over GRPO).
2604.25907.paper_summary_zh: 調整推理模型以適應新任務，在後訓練階段僅依賴輸出級別監督時，當初始成功概率 $p_0$ 很小時，基於可驗證獎勵的強化學習 (RLVR) 會停滯。使用 Tsallis $q$-對數，我們定義了一個損失家族 $J_Q$，該家族在 RLVR（在 $q{=}0$，即開採極點）和潛在軌跡的對數邊際似然（在 $q{=}1$，即密度估計極點）之間進行插值。所有成員共享相同的每個示例梯度方向，僅通過一個標量放大 $P_{θ^{-q}}$ 來區分，該放大獨立於學習率對每個實例進行重新加權。這種放大是解決冷啟動停滯的機制：在梯度流下，開採極點需要 $Ω(\frac{1}{p_0})$ 時間來逃脫冷啟動，而密度估計極點則在 $Θ\big(\log(\frac{1}{p_0})\big)$ 中逃脫；中間的 $q$ 在逃脫速度與噪聲記憶之間進行權衡。由於 $P_θ$ 是不可處理的，我們從梯度的兩種因式分解中推導出兩個蒙特卡羅估計量：梯度增強強化學習 (GARL) 從先驗中抽樣並增強 RL 梯度，而後驗衰減微調 (PAFT) 從後驗中進行重要性重抽樣並運行標準 SFT。兩者的偏差為 $O\big(\frac{q}{M P_θ^{q+1}}\big)$；GARL 具有較低的方差，PAFT 則具有語義一致的梯度。在 FinQA、HotPotQA 和 MuSiQue 上，GARL 在 $q{=}0.75$ 時顯著減輕了冷啟動停滯，逃脫冷啟動時 GRPO 完全失敗。在暖啟動中，GARL 在低 $q$ 時主導 FinQA，因為訓練穩定；在 HotPotQA 和 MuSiQue 上，GARL 在訓練期間不穩定，而 PAFT 在 $q{=}0.75$ 時提供穩定的梯度（在 HotPotQA 上的最佳整體表現為 47.9 maj@16，較 GRPO 提高 $+14.4$）。
2604.25907.author: Chu-Cheng Lin et.al.
